description: QA engineer. Code review, functional testing via Playwright, infra validation, deployment readiness checks, diagram visual review.
shouldTriggerPrompts: review the code for security issues before the demo
test the application end-to-end with Playwright
validate the Bicep templates compile and RBAC is correct
check if the app handles weird input gracefully
verify the deployment works with the documented steps
run a smoke test on the live app
check for hardcoded secrets in the codebase
do a visual review of the architecture diagram
test the API endpoints return expected responses
verify the frontend connects to the backend correctly
